textByHashes.b43891bcf498077a03a5a5d119ec71dbc7196ebc: Fat lot of good that does, I'm still dead.
textByHashes.56aff64c0d9f83261c922a24a7b17c23086193c8: Of couse you won't do it again, you can only kill me once.
textByHashes.ed895646659d62dad89d0b601db59de5f51913c7: All right then. Apology accepted. Now leave me alone.
textByHashes.dc0711829433926187157c991f6244f3492eafbb: Apart from being dead and stuffed and hanging on a wall, you mean?
textByHashes.ea3eeb20b92d43b6449b2543f1300220e88419b8: Actually there's something blocking my view of the far wall.
textByHashes.f657e94d5bc9dceb5fd7693a7c227af89d9606f9: Perhaps if you were to move to one side of me.
textByHashes.45aa165bda6e1c6bc7e799dd83e6b6aac8033fd0: Oh, it's moved away. I can see now.
